name: notion-extension
description: Notion database querying with people property filters, relation property updates, page-body image upload/read, and files-property attachment management. Designed for Waggle plugin.

tools.name: notion-query
tools.description: Preferred over the hosted Notion MCP for filtered/sorted database queries: runs raw Notion API filters server-side, including people-property filters (Assignee) the hosted tools cannot express. Accepts page_size / start_cursor / filter_properties so the caller can drive pagination and projection on large databases.

tools.name: notion-update-relation
tools.description: Use instead of the hosted notion-update-page for relation properties: writes relation page IDs directly, with replace (set exact list) and append (merge with existing, dedup) modes.

tools.name: notion-upload-image
tools.description: The only tool that can upload a local image file into a Notion page body (hosted Notion MCP tools cannot upload local files). Appends an image block from a local file (Notion File Upload API, max 20MB) or an external URL. Requires the integration's 'Insert content' capability.

tools.name: notion-read-images
tools.description: The only tool that returns a Notion page's images as inline image content the model can see (the hosted notion-fetch returns text only), with a JSON summary mapping block IDs to images.

tools.name: notion-set-files-property
tools.description: The only way to write a files-type page property (e.g. Attachments) — the hosted notion-update-page cannot set files properties. Uploads local files (Notion File Upload API, max 20MB) and/or stores external URLs, with replace and append modes. Requires the integration's 'Insert content' capability for uploads.

notion_token.title: Notion Internal Integration Token
notion_token.description: Your Notion internal integration token (ntn_...). Create one at https://www.notion.so/profile/integrations with Read content, Update content, and Insert content capabilities, then connect it to your Waggle page.
